name: NHL94 Curriculum
description: Sequential NHL94 curriculum that chains puck recovery, scoring, and defensive transition before launching the final model from the normal start state.

phases.name: GetPuckAZ
phases.description: Recover loose pucks in the attack zone and stabilize possession.

phases.name: ScoreGoalV2
phases.description: Convert attack-zone possession into reliable scoring pressure.

phases.name: DefenseZone
phases.description: Recover the puck in the defensive zone and transition it cleanly toward attack.
